name: Herige
summary: Herige trades in building materials for professional and DIY customers primarily in France. It also manufactures ready-mix concrete, industrial precast concrete, and insulated concrete forms, as well as industrial joinery under the BtoC brand. The company was formerly known as VM Mat√É¬©riaux and changed its name to Herige in May 2015. Herige is based in L'Herbergement, France.
